title: UK’s New Prime Minister Burnham Orders Cut in Taxes on Electricity
summary_full: Prime Minister Andy Burnham moved quickly to confront the high cost of living. And President Trump wished him well after a phone call between the two leaders.
summary_public: Prime Minister Andy Burnham moved quickly to confront the high cost of living. And President Trump wished him well after a phone call between the two leaders.
